meaning: adj.径直的,直接的,直系的,直率的,[天]由西向东运行的,顺行的adv.直接地vt.指引,指示,指挥,命令,导演vi.指导,指挥
examples: She prefers to act rather than direct.
The company finds clients through word of mouth, its Web site and direct mail to developers.
The route to Vanimo, a coastal city in northwestern Papua New Guinea, is not as direct.
